# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

### Ant Group and Tsinghua Release AReaL v1.0 for One-Click Agent Reinforcement Learning
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/ant-group-and-tsinghua-release-a-rea-l-v1-0-for-one-click-agent-reinforcement-learning
- Summary: Ant Group and Tsinghua University open-sourced AReaL v1.0 on March 4, 2026, a reinforcement learning framework that enables AI agents to connect to training systems with just one API change, achieving up to 2.77x faster training speeds.

### Accelerating Single-Pass SGD for Generalized Linear Prediction
- Source: HF Daily Papers
- Category: open-source

- Category: research
- URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.23546
- Summary: arXiv:2602.23546v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Human reasoning often involves working over limited information to arrive at probabilistic conclusions. In its simplest form, this involves making an inference that is not strictly entailed by a premise, but rather only likely given the premise. While...

- Summary: arXiv:2602.23547v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sentences like "She will go to France or Spain, or perhaps to Germany or France." appear formally redundant, yet become acceptable in contexts such as "Mary will go to a philosophy program in France or Spain, or a mathematics program in Germany or...

### [LIVE] Anthropic Distillation & How Models Cheat (SWE-Bench Dead) | Nathan Lambert & Sebastian Raschka
- Source: Latent Space
- Category: open-source
- URL: https://www.latent.space/p/paid-anthropic-distillation-and-how
